title: Missing initializer in parse.cc
body:
Warning during compilation (remember, warnings are probably errors!)

```
g++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -Ilibmisc  -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow   -g -O2 -MD -c parse.cc -o parse.o
parse.cc:8005:18: warning: missing initializer for member ‘vlltype::text’ [-Wmissing-field-initializers]
   = { 1, 1, 1, 1 }
```

```
g++ --version
g++ (Ubuntu 7.4.0-1ubuntu1~18.04.1) 7.4.0
```
